fields.name: id
fields.type: int (as-built autoincrement; → UUIDv7 string per S-2)

fields.name: amount
fields.type: int whole-naira as-built (→ integer kobo per S-1); original debt amount

fields.name: paidAmount
fields.type: int whole-naira as-built (→ integer kobo); sum of payments, derived

fields.name: remaining
fields.type: int whole-naira as-built (→ integer kobo); computed = (amount - paidAmount).clamp(0, amount)

fields.name: customer.name
fields.type: string (display only: 'X owes ₦Y', avatar, success copy)

reads.notes: repo.watchDebt(debtId) consumed via StreamBuilder<DebtView?>. DebtView = Debt joined with Customer + paidAmount (payment progress); remaining is a computed getter, not a stored column. Read is a local drift stream (offline-first), not a backend realtime channel. Screen pre-fills the amount field with the full remaining balance and shows 'Remaining after this' live as the trader types.

payload.name: debtId
payload.type: int as-built (→ UUIDv7 string FK to Debt per S-2); parent debt the payment settles

payload.name: amount
payload.type: int whole-naira as-built (→ integer kobo per S-1); amount received, digits-only, must be >0 and <= debt.remaining (partial payments allowed)

payload.name: method
payload.type: string; one of the inline _methods catalog values 'Cash' | 'Bank transfer' | 'POS' | 'Paystack link', default 'Cash'

payload.name: date
payload.type: DateTime; NOT sent by this screen as-built — server-authoritative createdAt = now() (drift Payments.createdAt set in repo.recordPayment). Include as server-set timestamp, not a client field.

payload.name: note
payload.type: string? OPTIONAL — NOT present on this screen or the drift Payments table as-built; listed for Payment-shape completeness only (do not wire a note input here).

expectedResponse.notes: As-built repo.recordPayment returns (paymentId, reference) where reference is a receipt number minted server-side ('OWM-00001' zero-padded from the id, 'OWM-TMP' placeholder pre-mint). Screen uses paymentId to navigate to /receipt/:paymentId when the 'Generate receipt' toggle is on. Partial payment auto-updates the debt balance: after recording, DebtView.remaining recomputes from the new paidAmount (product invariant — balance/remaining is traditional software, never AI, never a client-sent field). Debt reaching remaining==0 shows 'settled' vs 'shrinking' copy but there is no separate mark-paid call from this screen.

authContext.notes: Recording a payment is a debts read/write action. Per conventions Roles & permissions and supersede S-4 (coarse owner|staff), staff CAN record payments (read/write debts and customers); only delete/staff-mgmt/billing/payout are owner-only. Route defaults to the least-restrictive role that covers it → staff. Multi-tenant: Payment inherits businessId from its Debt, scoped to the JWT businessId.

special.notes: StreamBuilder reactivity is local drift, not a backend push/websocket. Receipt 'Share' is a stub navigation to /receipt, not a file download. Create is offline-first: writes locally + instantly, marks syncState=pending; per conventions create is idempotent on the client-minted id (S-2) and carries If-Match version on later edits.

uiStatesHandled: loading: watchDebt emits null → SizedBox.shrink (no debt yet)
empty-amount / disabled CTA: 'Complete payment' disabled while amount <= 0
validation: amount <= 0 → snackbar 'Enter an amount first'
validation: amount > remaining → snackbar "That's more than the ₦X remaining" (overpayment blocked)
partial-payment: live 'Remaining after this: ₦X' shown when 0 < amount < remaining (balance auto-updates)
payment-method picker bottom sheet over inline _methods catalog
success: post-write success screen with amount recorded, settled-vs-shrinking copy, shrunken DebtPanel, and Share-receipt vs Done based on the 'Generate receipt' toggle

inlineReferenceData.name: _methods (payment-method catalog)
inlineReferenceData.reconciliationNote: Inline top-level const catalog; also matches drift Payments.method default 'Cash'. Likely STAYS a local enum (payment method is a client-chosen label recorded verbatim into Payment.method), not a served resource. 'Paystack link' is the only method that ties to a backend seam (POST /debts/:id/pay-link + webhook auto-confirm); reconciliation decides serve-vs-local.
